region_mappings.provenance: cited literature pattern (PMID:1759558; PMID:1431963): typical medial-temporal atrophy in Alzheimer's disease, NOT segmented from this scan. Scan pair is a cross-sectional OASIS-1 comparison of two different subjects -- a CDR 0 reference (F, 70-79) vs this CDR 2 case -- using modulated GM probability maps (VBM) in MNI152 space; not a longitudinal same-patient pair.
region_mappings.notes: literature-level typical pattern, not a per-voxel atrophy segmentation of this patient
